nodes.name: POST /submit-order
nodes.notes: รับ payload จาก LIFF สาขา แล้วบันทึกลง Orders

parameters.jsCode:
const order = $node['Build Order Row'].json;
return [{ json: order.response || { success: true, orderId: order.Order_ID } }];

nodes.name: GET /get-order

nodes.name: POST /admin-approve
nodes.notes: รับค่าขนส่งจาก admin แล้ว update Orders

parameters.jsCode: const a=$node['Build Approval Row'].json,p=$node['Aggregate Delivery Note PDFs'].json,n=$node['Summarize Admin Approval Notify'].json;return[{json:{success:true,orderId:a.Order_ID,status:a.Status,subtotal:a.Subtotal,shippingCost:a.Shipping_Cost,discount:a.Discount,otherFee:a.Other_Fee,vatAmount:a.VAT_Amount,totalAmount:a.Total_Amount,adjustmentReason:a.Adjustment_Reason,approvalHistory:JSON.parse(a.Approval_History||'[]'),pdfUrl:p.pdfUrl,pdfUrls:p.pdfUrls,pageCount:p.pageCount,adminNotification:n}}];
